title: 美國國務卿蓬佩奧將發表題為＂共產中國與自由世界的未來＂的演講

replies.msg:
SECRETARY MICHAEL R. POMPEO

Secretary Pompeo is on travel to Yorba Linda, California. Please click here for more information.

1:05 p.m. LOCAL Secretary Pompeo takes a guided tour of the Richard Nixon Presidential Library, in Yorba Linda, California.
(POOLED CAMERA SPRAY)

1:40 p.m. LOCAL Secretary Pompeo delivers a speech on “Communist China and the Free World’s Future” and participates and a question and answer session at the Richard Nixon Presidential Library, in Yorba Linda, California.
(OPEN PRESS COVERAGE FOR PREREGISTERED PRESS)

Secretary Pompeo’s speech will be live streamed on www.state.gov.

2:50 p.m. LOCAL Secretary Pompeo meets with Chinese Dissidents and Diaspora, in Yorba Linda, California.
(POOLED CAMERA SPRAY AT TOP)
